title.rendered: AMI Joins Embedded World 2022 to Present “Firmware Reimagined for The Embedded World” from June 21-23 in Nuremberg

content.rendered:
ATLANTA, GEORGIA / NUREMBERG, GERMANY: AMI®, a global leader in the Dynamic Firmware market for worldwide computing, once again joins the Embedded World 2022 Exhibition and Conference taking place in person in Nuremberg, Germany, from June 21-23 at the Nuremberg Messe.

AMI will welcome visitors to Booth 2-200 of Hall 2 during Embedded World 2022. The company’s theme for this year is “Firmware Reimagined for the Embedded World”, showcasing the full range of AMI foundational technology solutions that support this diverse embedded ecosystem.

As always, AMI will showcase its latest products and innovations to the embedded ecosystem community. AMI representatives will be onsite to discuss how the company delivers “Firmware Reimagined for the Embedded World” with innovative solutions in security, orchestration, and manageability. These solutions help AMI customers overcome challenges and take advantage of opportunities in the ever-changing landscape of the embedded world.

“AMI is incredibly excited to be returning to Embedded World for the 20th year in a row! This event remains the perfect opportunity to meet with our customers and partners and showcase our latest products. As we expand into new embedded markets and develop new technologies – including security, cloud-based development and testing services – we look forward to meeting more design, manufacturing, and integrator members at this year’s event. We believe that our solutions offer increased value and benefit to our customers, and we look forward to sharing them at Embedded World 2022!” said Julien Witassek, Managing Director of AMI’s Germany Branch Office.

As the world’s leading trade fair for embedded system technologies, Embedded World is an essential event for anyone involved in the embedded systems industry. The three-day event brings together the latest in IoT, hardware, software, systems engineering, security, system-on-chip design and embedded vision in one location. With over 1,600 exhibitors and 32,000 visitors expected to attend, Embedded World is the perfect place to network and learn about the latest developments in embedded systems. From seasoned professionals to those just getting started in the industry, Embedded World is sure to have something for everyone.

If you’re attending Embedded World 2022, we invite you to stop by the AMI Booth 2-200 to learn more about our latest products and solutions for the embedded market. In addition, we’ll be happy to answer any questions you have and show you how our products can benefit your customers.

Those interested in scheduling a consultation with AMI at the event may request a meeting via our contact form at https://www.ami.com/contact-us/. Complimentary 3-day visitor passes are also available through a request form on our website at ami.com/ew22 or with the complimentary voucher code ew22web. Visitors to the exhibition must register online to redeem a voucher.

We’re looking forward to meeting with everyone at this key event and learning about the latest trends in the embedded ecosystem. See you in Nuremberg!
